# LockedCameraCaptureExtensionScene

**Protocol**

A protocol that provides the UI for the locked camera capture extension.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor protocol LockedCameraCaptureExtensionScene : AppExtensionScene
```

## Overview

Implement this protocol with the [doc://com.apple.LockedCameraCapture/documentation/LockedCameraCapture/LockedCameraCaptureUIScene] providing the UI.

## Extension

- **LockedCameraCaptureExtension**: A protocol that creates a locked camera capture extension.

## Inherits From

- AppExtensionScene

## Conforming Types

- LockedCameraCaptureUIScene
